commands.review_summary:
This PR adds the existing `ProviderRuntimeModel` metadata parameter to the sanitize-session-history test harness type.

PR surface: Source +2. Total +2 across 1 file.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main's `SanitizeSessionHistoryFn` test harness type lacks `model`, while the current test passes `model` and the real `sanitizeSessionHistory` implementation already accepts it.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed; the remaining action is maintainer handling for a protected, maintainer-labeled PR after required checks.

target.title: test(agents): type sanitize history model metadata
target.body:
## Summary

- Add `model?: ProviderRuntimeModel` to the sanitize-session-history test harness type so tests can pass the runtime model metadata now supported by `sanitizeSessionHistory`.
- Keeps the new reasoning replay metadata regression test type-correct under the core test typecheck lane.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts --reporter=dot` passed: 72 tests.
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test-harness.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts` passed.
- `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test-harness.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts` passed.
- `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD` passed.
- AWS Crabbox `pnpm check:changed` passed with exit 0 before the final docs-only rebase: provider `aws`, lease `cbx_7e6e9e11914b`, run `run_b0479c18c11b`, machine `c7a.8xlarge`, lanes `core`, `coreTests`, lease stopped.

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: current main's core test typecheck rejects the new sanitize-session-history reasoning metadata test because the harness function type omitted the existing `model` parameter.

Real environment tested: focused local sanitize-session-history Vitest shard and AWS Crabbox Linux changed-gate runner.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts --reporter=dot`; `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test-harness.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts`; `node scripts/run-oxlint.mjs src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test-harness.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner.sanitize-session-history.test.ts`; `git diff --check origin/main...HEAD`; `node scripts/crabbox-wrapper.mjs run --provider aws --target linux --idle-timeout 90m --ttl 180m --timing-json --shell -- "pnpm check:changed"`.

Evidence after fix: focused tests passed on pushed SHA `4dfc676b6ab`; AWS Crabbox `run_b0479c18c11b` completed `pnpm check:changed` with exit 0 before a clean docs-only rebase.

Observed result after fix: the harness type accepts the same runtime model metadata that `sanitizeSessionHistory` already accepts, unblocking the core test typecheck lane.

What was not tested: live model execution; this is a test harness type alignment only.
target.author: vincentkoc
